div.p: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D18.S.DTP.Delayed or interrupted schedule table in the Immunization CPG

tr.th: First DTP dose from the primary series was administered
Second DTP dose from the primary series was administered
Third DTP dose from the primary series was administered. The primary DTP series has been completed
Tetanus and diphtheria-containing vaccine booster dose 1 (delayed start)
Tetanus and diphtheria-containing vaccine booster dose 1 (delayed start) Due Date
Tetanus and diphtheria-containing vaccine booster dose 1 (delayed start) Create
Tetanus and diphtheria-containing vaccine booster dose 1 (delayed start) Overdue
Tetanus and diphtheria-containing vaccine booster dose 1 (delayed start) Expiration
First tetanus and diphtheria booster dose was administered
Second tetanus and diphtheria booster dose was administered. Tetanus and diphtheria immunization schedule has been completed
Tetanus and diphtheria-containing vaccine booster dose 2 (delayed start)
Tetanus and diphtheria-containing vaccine booster dose 2 (delayed start) Due Date
Tetanus and diphtheria-containing vaccine booster dose 2 (delayed start) Create
Tetanus and diphtheria-containing vaccine booster dose 2 (delayed start) Overdue
Tetanus and diphtheria-containing vaccine booster dose 2 (delayed start) Expiration
Pertussis-containing vaccine booster dose 1 (delayed start) Expiration
Pertussis-containing booster dose was administered. Pertussis immunization schedule has been completed
Pertussis-containing vaccine booster dose 1 (delayed start) Due Date
Pertussis-containing vaccine booster dose 1 (delayed start) Overdue
Pertussis-containing vaccine booster dose 1 (delayed start) Create
